title: cyclosorus auriculatus
intro: Cyclosorus auriculatus, also known as the ear-leaved cyclosorus or ear-leaved ironfern, is a species of fern in the family Thelypteridaceae, native to tropical Asia. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial effects, making it useful in treating various health conditions such as fever, rheumatism, and gastrointestinal issues. The health benefits of Cyclosorus auriculatus include its ability to reduce pain and swelling, improve digestion, and boost the immune system. Herbal preparations of the plant are often made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be taken orally to reap its medicinal benefits.
